text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O has managed to leave quite a
mark on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while we bask in the glory of our
victories...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You there, halt! Personnel unrelated to the
academy are prohibited from entering!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I would never mistake my trainer for a stranger!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What you just witnessed was a class rep-style
knee-slapper!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
How was it? I'm more than a studious model
student! I can crack jokes too! Isn't it refreshing?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This just shows how much I've grown under your
care, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But let's cut the chit-chat! I have some work to
attend to as class rep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Doing the rounds to see if there are any students
playing hooky, assisting the teachers, cleaning
the blackboards...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I've got a lot to do! And once I'm finished...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: We can finally start today's training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Please wait at the tracks for me. I'll get everything
done before you can say "Bakushin"!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Here we go! I'm facing my enormous, grandiose,
super big dreams head-on today as well!
